review_title: Valuable tool for time management!
description: While still in the early stages of deployment, we are beginning to develop labor hour benchmarks for certain tasks and projects. Without information like this we could not run the business or make plans for future staffing requirements.
author: Paul B.
pros: Having used Time and Attendance systems in the past, I was pleasantly surprised with the setup and ease of customization. We’ve been able to create as many projects as we like and selectively assign those projects to the appropriate individual(s). Without this customization, my staff would have to scroll through a long list of tasks to find the one they want. And the whole point of any time and attendance system is to collect data to help run the business – not become a hinderance to someone who is just trying to get their job done. From a personal perspective I find that it helps me stay focused on the task that I’m working on, while it can be tempting to answer that email the second it arrives…that’s usually not the most effective and efficient way to manage one’s time.
cons: Editing timesheets can be a bit cumbersome, but I’m still a relatively new user, this should get easier with practice.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best Attendance Tracker for Distributed Teams
author: Selva M.
pros: Attendance Bot has been a game-changer for managing our distributed team's work hours and leave requests. It automates reminders, time tracking, and leave balance updates all within tools like Slack or Microsoft Teams. It saves us hours of manual follow-up every week. Setup was easy, and the UI is clean and user-friendly. We also love the customization options especially setting different policies for different departments.
cons: Regarding Cons, there isn't any features or incidence that makes me like least about Attendance Bot.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Could have been so good but instead made more work for us
description: It's created 10X more work than doing this manually.
author: Catalina B.
pros: Love how it integrated with Slack to make it easy for staff to clock in and out.
cons: The logic of this software is fundamentally broken. It is far to segmented and the features don't speak together properly. Their support is not very helpful. Takes like 5 emails just to get them to understand what your problem is and you can't call them. I was given a number once and when I called it was their sales department.... Who then tried to cancel our call. The reports are terrible. It's a great concept and I hope one day they work out all the issues but save yourself the time and don't get this.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Simple and Handy Attendance Tracking in Slack
description: AttendanceBot has been a solid tool for keeping track of attendance. It’s simple, reliable, and fits nicely into our existing workflow. Great option for teams that live in Slack and want something lightweight that just works.
author: Bryan L.
pros: Super easy to use and works smoothly inside Slack. Clocking in/out and requesting leave is quick, and it saves a lot of time compared to manual tracking. Setup was straightforward, and it does exactly what we need without being complicated.
cons: Initial setup takes a little getting used to, but nothing major. Some advanced reporting and customization options are also a bit limited.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A very useful attendance control tool
author: Malory C.
pros: The impact of this tool on our operation has been very positive. It has allowed us to make detailed follow-ups on the activities carried out by each employee: How much time they invest in each project, specific times to solve each activity and validate the performance during that period. Both employees and administrators have liked the application too much. It gives us more order and control in the operation of the operation.
cons: What we did not like very much is that we are different departments managing the same account and what is configured for a specific area, is for the entire operation. It would be great to be able to configure different rules for each area, since they are not the same in all our operation.We also don't like that when we filter schedules to track, they appear in disarray, instead of showing in order from the time that starts earlier to the one that starts later.
author_profession: Customer Service and VIP Manager Latam
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Your friendly smart punch card
description: AMAZING Few companie have such a good feedback loop, every time we asked for a new feature the team would just try to make sure it was what we needed. I think they are always moving adding features that make users happy!
author: Jose Pablo M.
pros: We needed some way to keep track of the time that we were spending in each project, we are a small studio and creating our own software to handle time was out of scope, we were using slack free, and we had so many limitations. When we learned about attendance bot I fell in love, it would allow our team to keep track of hours. rates and even measure how much time we were putting into the project!
cons: The fact that we had to pay haha JK I think the thing we like the least is that sometimes there might be bugs with the punches, meaning I have to fix them manually

review_title: A hidden gem within the vast Internet
description: It saves you a great time and effort in team work even if you are in different regions or far from each other through this program you can know where your employees are and know the salaries of the team. It is the perfect choice for remote work
author: Moaaz E.
pros: Easy and complete clarity in using as a team that facilitates work for you. You can do anything with limited steps such as taking sick leave and tracking team work hours. The best thing for me is that you can use it through the mobile phone with ease and without us or complicated processes.
cons: I almost don't see any negatives. but I hope that there will be a little less pricing plan to suit everyone. Thank you and I wish you progress and prosperity forever.

review_title: Excellent Tool which solved many day to day challenges
description: AttendenceBot solved many day to day challenges for us. The best thing is the support from the team from Demo to integration. User experience is excellent, our team took no time to adapt to the system as it is so simple to understand. Overall we are very happy with the product and would definitely recommend it.
author: Bimal S P.
pros: - Simple and effective UI/UX - Bot integration is seamless - Customisation options for vacation management - Almost work as a self service portal for employees - Time tracking really helps the payroll team
cons: We are looking forward for the Jira integration (Which will be coming out soon as informed)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy time-tracking. Seamless integration with Slack
description: Saved time. Employees could track their time in the app we use the most.
author: Adam G.
pros: It was easy for our employees to track their time. It integrated nicely into our Slack workflow. Overall it streamlined everything for our company. We would recommend this for any company who uses Slack.
cons: It was a little bit challenging to edit the time to track reports in Slack. It would be a bit easier if there was also a web-based dashboard where we could make edits.

review_title: Time off requests made easy
author: Christopher C.
pros: Ability to quickly look at the calendar and plan for time off requests for my team and I. Ease of use when applying for leave, slack/mobile app integration and reporting.
cons: Reporting Parameters are not as intuitive.

review_title: Excellent Software to use for Remote work
description: The Attendance Bot is not just an administrative tool but a comprehensive solution that enhances the remote work experience for employees and managers. Its efficiency comes from its ability to seamlessly blend into daily work routines, provide actionable insights into workforce productivity, and support a culture of accountability and engagement. For companies looking to navigate the complexities of remote work, investing in an Attendance Bot could be a game-changer in achieving higher productivity and employee satisfaction.
author: Mit T.
pros: The bot integrates smoothly with popular communication platforms like Slack, Microsoft Teams, and Google Workspace, making it accessible within the tools teams already use daily. This ease of integration means that employees can clock in and out with simple commands, participate in quick check-ins, and even report their progress on tasks without leaving their primary workspace. For managers, viewing attendance records, generating reports, and analysing trends in real-time are invaluable for making informed decisions and adjusting workflows.
cons: One of the primary concerns with any tool that tracks employee activity is privacy. Employees may feel uncomfortable knowing their work hours, productivity, and well-being are constantly monitored.

review_title: Can't imagine work without AttendanceBot
author: Jason S.
pros: I love how easy it is for my team to manage time off requests. The interactive menu for submitting the request and also as a manager, I get alerts to my phone or desktop that I can approve and track with a click of a button. The reporting is great to help me reconcile at the end of the pay period. When I go on vacation, it is easy to assign the approvals to another manager until I get back.
cons: It would be cool if it remembered the last options selected in the interface for both time off requests and reporting as they are typically the same options selected.

review_title: AttendanceBot has been a great help in managing our fully remote, international team.
author: Carol C.
pros: It is a great for invoicing, tracking time spent on different projects, and for managing PTO/PTO requests. Every time we run into issues or have questions and concerns, their support team is quick to respond with a solution. With Slack integration, our staff doesn’t have to worry about yet another software - everything they need to do on a daily basis can be done right in the Slack channel. AttendanceBot reminders help make sure everyone clocks in and out on time, and timesheet reports can be downloaded at any time.
cons: We did run into some issues due to having team members in several different timezones. Shifts were showing up incorrectly in the calendar and punches didn’t match people’s actual hours worked. Also, setting up shifts that are not your normal 9-5 M-F is not as straightforward as we would like — several people in our team have rotating schedules and they need to be manually set up. We also noticed some glitches when viewing the shift management calendar.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Attendancebot App on Slack
author: Benjamin Sri S.
pros: When my team clocks in/out and updates their status on Slack, I know how many hours they have to work a day.
cons: I have no comments on attendancebot; the app assists me when other apps are unable to provide what I require.

review_title: So easy to use!
author: Ike M.
pros: I love how easy attendanceBot makes it for my hourly employees to clock-in and clock-out, and how easy it is to calculate hours for payroll at the end of the Month.
cons: There have been tools that are difficult to figure out how to use the first few times and settings I did not know were active. But attendance bot has been very helpful in resolving these issues.

review_title: Perfect for what it does
description: Great, it is rare for me to encounter something that is so user-friendly and does the job as described. Would happily use again or recommend to others.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to set up, easy to use, great support whenever we needed help - AttendanceBot was a total pleasure for us to use.
cons: N/A. I have no negative impression of this software.

review_title: Great interface, easy to use.
author: Jamil R.
pros: 1: Easy to use 2: Great interface 3: Leaves history details 4: Team members on leave details 5: Fully automized 6: No paperwork
cons: 1: Export leaves balance history option was missing. For example, I had to go page by page in the leave balance section to see at what specific date I had how much balance. The balance and changes made in the balance were not exporting. 2: Little expensive for organizations having big number of employees, for e.g. organization with 200+ employees.

review_title: Excelente attendance control. Must for anyone with remote employees using slack.
description: Attendance Bot has really allowed us to maximize or use of slack and our communications with employees, particularly for those outside the country.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: That it allows me to know when people clock in and clock out and keep control of my staff no matter where they're working in the world.
cons: I'm pretty happy, but I guess it could have more pricing options.

review_title: Great Tool for Leave Management
author: Nyawira M.
pros: Attendance Bot allows for customized time off, multiple leave types, and no hustle approval process.
cons: Attendance bot works perfectly for me so I have no dislikes.

review_title: Simple, seamless and effective
description: Super easy, no major employee complaints (none actually)
author: Susanna F.
pros: it eliminates the need for any setup or training. The configuration settings work for any policy you have.
cons: Reports are excel sheets - I would have liked a more robust dashboard. Minor bugs Would like more integrations with Project Management softwares
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Love the technology
description: It has been a great switch from the paper time sheet system we used prior
author: Rachel W.
pros: I love that our team can clock in from our phones and also have the location where they clocked in from. Much easier than the paper timesheet system we used before
cons: It’s hard to remember which thing to type for each report you want to do, but there is a cheat sheet for that purpose

review_title: a great experience easy to use and very helpful with my work
description: a better organization in the business and with my team
author: Martin A.
pros: is a great way to make the checkout and check-in of the employees and view the times that they get in and get out and request leaves
cons: there are not much of cons but the only thing I would like they improve is the format of the hours report

review_title: Easy to use and integrates well with Slack
description: We used it as a team attendance for our robotics team . we tried multiple other solutions over years but the integration with slack our main communication tool was the best we could ask for
author: Prasad K.
pros: Really easy to use if your if you a slack user. integrates well with slack.
cons: Not sure if its a con, but we would like to see if there could be some sort of geo fencing..but not a deal breaker though.

review_title: AttendanceBot affords us a system that does effortless work hours logging.
description: It simplifies and streamlines things, especially with regards to office communication and administration.
author: Jaquiline F.
pros: I love the HR assistance functionality. You just capture dates for leave request. Even a simple sentence will inform your team when you are working remotely, when this automatically feeds through to our company calendar. It's great! All of this can be done from your laptop or even your mobile, if you are out and about.
cons: You must have the correct date format, or else it doesn't get the request or the number of leave days are totally out.

review_title: Outstanding
description: Easy to configure and install. extremely easy to share to the team.
author: Stephen R.
pros: Perfect ease of use for my team, linking into MS Teams is perect. typing a few simple words logs all the detail i need.
cons: Nothing. everything i require has been provided.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
